name: research-workflow
description: Domain-agnostic research-coding workflow discipline for computational science (JAX/Python research family). 52 skills across collaborate / scope / build-correctly / equation-critical sources / verify / review / record / communicate / reproduce, plus an equation-verifier agent and six slash commands. v1.3.1 hardens verification gates, skill routing checks, and shipped MyST plugin escaping. The suite covers evidence-first execution, numerical validation, reproducibility, PDF equation extraction, equation-to-code traceability, reference-license firewalls, errata ledgers, computational-physics code review, figure faithfulness, MyST documentation authoring, eight self-limiting enforcement hooks, and per-domain lenses for reference-parity work.
